chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 394 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1841/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with Abdul Nasir Khokhar, Chief Post Master, GPO Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< On 17-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “Learned AAG files comments on behalf of respondents No.1 to 6, taken on record. None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 12.08.2025, when Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada Advocate held brief on behalf of petitioners’ counsel. Under the circumstances, this petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 06-10-2025, for which intimation notice be issued to counsel for the petitioners.” Despite intimation notice to the Counsel for the Petitioners for today nobody has turned up to pursue the matter, which is pending without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners’ and their Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same vigilantly. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
